Name: Marine Science Odyssey
Description: Marine Science Odyssey is the world's only Global Marine Science Directory, offering a comprehensive platform for all things marine science. It features TV channels available on Apple TV, Roku, Fire TV, and Samsung, providing engaging content for viewers. In addition to TV programming, the directory offers books, podcasts, apps, video games, and exciting global adventures. With its diverse range of resources, it aims to educate and inspire people about marine life and environmental conservation worldwide. MarineScienceOdyssey.org'
